name: Insurer wants an exam for my chemical illness claim. Do I have to go in Utah?
description: Yes, or risk denial; usually one exam.[4]

mainEntity.name: Insurer wants an exam for my chemical illness claim. Do I have to go in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, or risk denial; usually one exam.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, with adequate notice; refusal risks denial for non-cooperation, usually one exam.[4] Key factors: (1) Limits exist; (2) Prepare with records; (3) Doctor chosen by insurer.[4] Attend but review report; attorney advises.[4] Protects your claim.
